title: GoCell Status Board
description: Operational layer tracking journey delivery status. Does not participate in architectural legality checks. Entries with missing journeys produce warnings, not errors.

journeyId.description: Reference to a journey id (must start with J-).

state.description: Current delivery state of the journey.

blocker.description: Description of the blocking issue, if any. Empty string when unblocked.

updatedAt.description: Date when this entry was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).
